ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" INTEGER /* Unique code assigned to each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the course belongs to */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Format of the course (e.g., online, on-campus) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the schedule belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course (e.g., online, on-campus) */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the course (if on-campus) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the course (if online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is registering for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student registering for the course */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the student registered for the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date for the course registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the course registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the course registration */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date for the course registration */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the course registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the instructor is teaching */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)
